base.description: A "5-limit" tuning framework for constructing chromatic scales using exclusively ratios of integers 2, 3, 5. Read: http://www.tonalsoft.com/enc/j/just.aspx

grama.description: The Indian grama scale as conceptualized by E. J. Arnold. Publication: ‘L'intonation juste dans la théorie ancienne de l'Inde : les applications aux musiques modale et harmonique’. Revue de Musicologie, vol. 71c n° 1-2, 1985, p. 11-38. Edited and translated by Bernard Bel This version has been modified to define 22 notes on 23 intervals: it has no "m4" (Ma tivra + pramana shruti).

2_cycles_of_fifths.description: Two series of perfect fifths including ascending major thirds (Asselin 2000 p.62) Created 2021-01-08 09:02:23

3_cycles_of_fifths.description: Three series of perfect fifths including ascending and descending major thirds (Asselin 2000 p.62) Created 2021-01-08 09:02:23

BACH.description: Kellner's BACH temperament (Asselin 2000 p.101) Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/5 comma (2021-01-15 16:10:04) Added fifths down: “do,fa,sib,mib,lab,reb,solb” starting fraction 1/1 (2021-01-15 16:11:48) Created meantone upward notes “mi,si” fraction 3/2 (2021-01-15 16:13:36)

Zarlino_natural.description: A traditional scale constructed with simple integer ratios

barca.description: Barca temperament (Asselin 2000 p.106) Created 2021-01-16 17:56:02 Added fifths down: “do,fa,sib” starting fraction 1/1 (2021-01-16 17:57:57) Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/6 comma (2021-01-16 18:02:25) Created meantone upward notes “fa#,do#,sol#,re#” fraction 3/2 (2021-01-16 18:03:49)

bethisy.description: Béthisy temperament (Asselin 2000 p.121) Created 2021-01-16 19:21:57 Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 19:23:36) Created meantone downward notes “do,fa,sib,mib” fraction 3/2 adjusted 1/12 comma (2021-01-16 19:25:49) Created meantone downward notes “mib,sol#” fraction 3/2 (2021-01-16 19:26:26) Equalized intervals over series “mi,si,fa#,do#,sol#” approx fraction 3/2 adjusted -1.7 cents to ratio = 1.499 (2021-01-16 19:28:09)

chaumont.description: Chaumont temperament (Asselin 2000 p.109) Created 2021-01-16 18:06:34 Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#,do#,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 18:08:41) Created meantone downward notes “do,fa,sib,mib” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 18:09:41)

classic.description: Classic temperament (Asselin 2000 p.76) Equivalent to Chaumont (p.109) Created 2021-01-14 15:38:08 Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#,do#,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-14 15:40:20) Created meantone downward notes “do,fa,sib,mib” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-14 15:40:57)

corrette.description: Corrette temperament (Asselin 2000 p.111) Created 2021-01-16 18:13:10 Created meantone upward notes “fa,do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#,do#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 18:16:40) Created meantone downward notes “fa,sib,mib” fraction 3/2 adjusted 1/12 comma (2021-01-16 18:34:13) Created meantone upward notes “do#,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted 1/12 comma (2021-01-16 18:38:14) Base note reset to ‘do’ (2021-01-16 18:40:53)

d_alembert_rousseau.description: D'Alembert-Rousseau temperament (Asselin 2000 p.119) Created 2021-01-16 19:04:44 Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 19:12:08) Created meantone downward notes “do,fa,sib,mib,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted 1/12 comma (2021-01-16 19:17:25) Equalized intervals over series “sol#,do#,fa#,si,mi” approx fraction 2/3 adjusted 2.2 cents to ratio = 0.668 (2021-01-16 19:19:34)

equal_tempered.description: This is an equal-tempered scale for BP3 + Csound. Created 2021-02-13 19:09:08

marpourg.description: Marpourg temperament (Asselin 2000 p.117) Created 2021-01-16 18:58:49 Created meantone upward notes “fa,do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 19:00:42) Equalized intervals over series “fa,la#,re#,sol#,do#,fa#” approx fraction 2/3 adjusted -2.8 cents to ratio = 0.666 (2021-01-16 19:02:32) Base note reset to ‘do’ (2021-01-16 19:03:15)

pure_minor-thirds.description: Pure minor-thirds temperament (Asselin 2000 p.82) Created 2021-01-15 15:13:09 Created meantone upward notes “mib,sib,fa,do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#,do#,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/3 comma (2021-01-15 15:15:22) Base note reset to ‘do’ (2021-01-15 15:16:00)

rameau_en_do.description: Rameau meantone in C temperament (Asselin 2000 p.113) Created 2021-01-16 18:41:56 Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#,do#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 18:44:03) Added fifths down: “do,fa” starting fraction 1/1 (2021-01-16 18:49:25) Created meantone upward notes “do#,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2022-02-04 18:09:16) Created meantone downward notes “fa,la#” fraction 3/2 (2021-01-16 18:54:20) Equalized intervals over series “sol#,re#,la#” approx fraction 3/2 adjusted 9.1 cents to ratio = 1.508 (2022-02-04 18:10:27)

sauveur.description: Sauveur temperament (Asselin 2000 p. 81) Created 2021-01-16 10:37:52 Created meantone downward notes “do,fa,sib,mib” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/5 comma (2021-01-16 10:44:41) Created meantone upward notes “do,sol,re,la,mi,si,fa#,do#,sol#” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/5 comma (2021-01-16 10:48:56)

scale_1.description: Two series of perfect fifths including ascending major thirds (Asselin 2000 p.62) Created 2021-01-08 09:02:23

schlick(bad).description: Schlick temperament (Asselin 2000 p.88) Created 2021-01-16 10:56:35 [INCORRECT] Created meantone downward notes “la,re,sol,do,fa” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 10:58:50) Created meantone upward notes “la,mi,si” fraction 3/2 adjusted -1/4 comma (2021-01-16 10:59:48) Created meantone upward notes “la,do#” fraction 5/4 (2021-01-16 11:04:11) Equalized intervals over series “si,fa#,do#” approx fraction 3/2 adjusted -5.4 cents to ratio = 1.495 (2021-01-16 11:05:59) Created meantone downward notes “sol,mib” fraction 5/4 (2021-01-16 11:07:31) Equalized intervals over series “mib,sib,fa” approx fraction 3/2 adjusted -5.3 cents to ratio = 1.495 (2021-01-16 11:08:47) Created meantone downward notes “do,lab” fraction 5/4 (2021-01-16 11:13:58) Created meantone upward notes “mi,sol#” fraction 5/4 adjusted 2/3 comma (2021-01-16 11:23:39) [estimation] Base note reset to ‘do’ (2021-01-16 11:25:48)
